programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: O Ke Ali'I Wale No Ka'u Makemake
programme.desc: McGarrett and Danny pose as drug pilots in a plan to stop a meth epidemic on the island; Danny is forced to break cover and land the plane when McGarrett is seriously wounded.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Makaukau 'oe e Pa'ani?
programme.desc: The team hunts for a murderer who has been targeting serial killers, marking their corpses with an ivory chess piece.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: No Ke Ali'i Wahine A Me Ka Aina
programme.desc: A rogue MI-6 agent is the key to finding a terrorist who plans to cause the meltdown of nuclear reactors across Europe; McGarrett and Danny need the help of an FBI profiler to find a killer.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: He Moho Hou
programme.desc: After finding a corpse in her bed, FBI profiler Alicia Brown joins McGarrett in a hunt for a killer; Kono reconnects with a former surfing competitor.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Hu A'e Ke Ahi Lanakila A Kamaile
programme.desc: When the serial killer that Alicia and McGarrett have been hunting kidnaps them, it's up to Five-0 to find them before it's too late.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Ke Ku 'Ana
programme.desc: A cache of guns is stolen by a person looking to make a statement on gun violence; Kono and Adam are reunited.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Resort + Desi + Riley + Window Cleaner + Witness
programme.desc: Mac and the team infiltrate a hotel used as a hideout for criminals and find a woman with vital information on Codex.

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.desc: When Taylor's former protégé is killed while preventing a bioweapon from falling into the wrong hands, Mac and the team must find the weapon, so Desi can pull off the ultimate heist before it's sold to a terrorist cell.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Eclipse + USMC-1856707 + Step Potential + Chain Lock + Ma
programme.desc: When Russ is kidnapped, Mac and the team must break out a previously murderous psychopath, now pacifist, from prison to help find him; while on the run, Mac and Desi are forced to confront their relationship issues.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Banh Bao + Sterno + Drill + Burner + Mason
programme.desc: Mac's meeting with Desi's parents goes sideways when her brother finds himself in trouble and needing their help; Russ and Matty must ask an old nemesis for assistance when their new recruitment candidate is kidnapped.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Jack + Kinematics + Safe Cracker + MgKNO3 + GTO
programme.desc: Using a cryptic postcard as their only clue, Mac and the team must solve a fallen friend's final case and bring him justice.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Quarantine + N95 + Landline + Telescope + Social Distance
programme.desc: During COVID-19's first stay-at-home order, Mac, Bozer and Riley must stop a crime in progress at their neighbor's house; Russ' romantic fling takes on a longer and more complicated turn when they quarantine together.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Golden Lancehead + Venom + Pole Vault + Blood + Baggage
programme.desc: A secret experimental cancer treatment Mac's developing with a friend is discovered when culprits ransack their lab, kidnap Mac's partner and plan to use the research to create a powerful new nerve agent.

programme.desc: Mac and team rush to help when Matty's former mentor, Ian Cain, and his embassy staff come down with a deadly, mysterious illness; Taylor and Bozer work with Jerry Ortega to infiltrate a Codex cell.

programme.title: Criminal Minds

programme.desc: The BAU hunts for an Unsub who deliberately disfigures victims; Rossi and his ex-wife have an uncomfortable reunion.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Devil's Backbone
programme.desc: The BAU plays a dangerous cat and mouse game with a convicted serial killer who may have information on the whereabouts of two kidnapped boys.

programme.title: Criminal Minds

programme.title: Criminal Minds

programme.title: Criminal Minds

programme.desc: As the BAU welcomes back Emily Prentiss, they're called upon to investigate the disappearance of three women.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Keeper
programme.desc: The team searches for a serial killer along the Appalachian Trail in rural Virginia.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: The Anti-Terror Squad
programme.desc: The BAU investigates the case of two murdered families, where two high school students are the sole survivors.

programme.title: Criminal Minds

programme.title: Criminal Minds

programme.title: Criminal Minds

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Profiling 202

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Seek & Destroy
programme.desc: The team investigates when home invasions involving casualties strike upscale neighborhoods in San Diego.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Surface Tension
programme.desc: The BAU investigates when a bizarre hieroglyph is found under a deceased homeless man's armpit; Reid decides to take his mother out of a clinical study early to bring her home.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: A Good Husband
programme.desc: The BAU team is called in to investigate when male bodies are discovered that seem to be impossible to identify.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Spencer
programme.desc: When a BAU member gets in trouble in Mexico, the team enlists the services of the International Response Team for help.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Whacked
programme.desc: When a condemned ax-murderer on death row appeals for his life, the team must investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio finally learns the truth about what happened to his brother, and the repercussions will change his life forever.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: From the Grave
programme.desc: Horatio finds himself with a price on his head when he makes plans to shut down the illegal smuggling operation of one of Miami's fiercest gangs.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Blood in the Water

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Prey
programme.desc: When a teenage tourist goes missing, the team investigates the dark side of Miami's nightclub scene.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: 48 Hours to Life

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Three-Way

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Under Suspicion

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Felony Flight
programme.desc: A convicted murderer escapes and begins to kill again, and the assailant's original arresting officer, Mac Taylor (Gary Sinise), comes to help Horatio Caine recapture the felon.

programme.sub-title: The Shot in the Dark

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Friend in Need

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Fact in the Fiction

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Survivor in the Soap

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Doom in the Gloom
programme.desc: The investigation into the death of a former Marine leads the team to a group obsessed with preparing for the apocalypse; Sweets finds an apartment.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Blood From the Stones
programme.desc: The team investigates when an undercover cop turns up dead with a bag of diamonds inside his body; Brennan struggles to be likable as the subject of a documentary film.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Maiden in the Mushrooms
programme.desc: The team investigates when a TV producer is murdered; Christine is accused of biting a classmate; Hodgins uses his tools at the Jeffersonian to chemically re-create Finn's hot sauce.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Party in the Pants
programme.desc: The team investigates when a stockbroker -- who moonlights as a stripper -- is murdered; after a 24-year absence, Booth's mother (Joanna Cassidy) shows up with a request.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Pathos in the Pathogens
programme.desc: The team tries to prevent a viral outbreak during an investigation into a journalist's murder, whose infected body is found at a biohazard facility; when Arastoo Vaziri is affected by the mutated virus, the only way to save him is to solve the case.

programme.title: The Listener
programme.sub-title: Lady in the Lake
programme.desc: Toby helps a woman regain her memory and draws the attention of the Integrated Investigative Bureau.

programme.title: The Listener
programme.sub-title: Crime Seen

programme.title: The Listener

programme.sub-title: Rabid

programme.desc: The investigation in Texas reveals a deep web of corruption; Garcia must save a friend.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: X

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.desc: When Mac and the team are unable to prevent sensitive intel from falling into Codex's hands, Mac must scale a vertical cliff using only gear he can cobble together himself to prevent the info's transmission.

programme.desc: Mac and Riley go missing and wake up 24 hours later in a cornfield with no memory of how they got there; they must unravel the mystery and find out how to get rid of the nanotrackers in their bodies, no matter the cost.

programme.title: Lone Wolf and Cub: Baby Cart to Hades
programme.desc: In a rare moment of compassion, Lone Wolf rescues a girl who has killed a pimp in self-defense. By his code, he is forced to endure being tortured to within an inch of his life. Lone Wolf takes to the road again, where his expertise is very much in demand, so much so that a would-be employer had already had a contract placed on him. The slayer with the baby cart proceeds down bloodstained paths to Hades.

programme.title: Triumph Of The Ten Gladiators
programme.desc: Ten of the finest gladiators are sent to rescue their kidnapped queen from her traitorous prime minister.

programme.desc: A band of Mexican gun-runners employed by a revolutionary general accept an American into their gang, unaware of his intentions.

programme.title: All the Way Boys
programme.desc: A pair of conniving bush pilots crash-land in the Peruvian jungle, where they come across a community of diamond miners under the thumb of a greedy speculator.

programme.title: Nine Deaths of the Ninja
programme.desc: A group of drug runners/freedom fighters has kidnapped a busload of tourists in the Philippines and is threatening to kill them all if one of their partners is not released from prison and the government doesn't halt its anti-drug policies. To stop the criminals, a trio of specialist soldiers are called in. Even with all their training, will they be able to stop the terrorists when they begin killing hostages and turning loose their squads of attack midgets?

programme.title: Compañeros
programme.desc: A Swedish arms dealer and a Mexican peon team up to rescue the intellectual leader of the Revolutionary cause, while taking part in numerous misadventures along the way.

programme.desc: One year after outwitting the FBI and winning the public’s adulation with their mind-bending spectacles, the Four Horsemen resurface only to find themselves face to face with a new enemy who enlists them to pull off their most dangerous heist yet.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: Combat has taken its toll on Rambo, but he's finally begun to find inner peace in a monastery. When Rambo's friend and mentor Col. Trautman asks for his help on a top secret mission to Afghanistan, Rambo declines but must reconsider when Trautman is captured.

programme.title: TRANSFORMERS: RISE OF THE BEASTS
programme.desc: When a new threat capable of destroying the entire planet emerges, Optimus Prime and the Autobots must team up with a powerful faction known as the Maximals. With the fate of humanity hanging in the balance, humans Noah and Elena will do whatever it takes to help the Transformers as they engage in the ultimate battle to save Earth.

programme.title: Ghost Rider: Spirit Of Vengeance
programme.desc: When the devil resurfaces with aims to take over the world in human form, Johnny Blaze reluctantly comes out of hiding to transform into the flame-spewing supernatural hero Ghost Rider -- and rescue a 10-year-old boy from an unsavory end.

programme.title: Kung fu hustle
programme.desc: Set in Canton, China in the 1940s, the story revolves in a town ruled by the Axe Gang, Sing who desperately wants to become a member. He stumbles into a slum ruled by eccentric landlords who turns out to be the greatest kung-fu masters in disguise. Sing's actions eventually cause the Axe Gang and the slumlords to engage in an explosive kung-fu battle. Only one side will win and only one hero will emerge as the greatest kung-fu master of all.

programme.title: Black Adam
programme.desc: Nearly 5,000 years after he was bestowed with the almighty powers of the Egyptian gods—and imprisoned just as quickly—Black Adam is freed from his earthly tomb, ready to unleash his unique form of justice on the modern world.

programme.title: The Transporter Refueled
programme.desc: The fast-paced action movie is again set in the criminal underworld in France, where Frank Martin is known as The Transporter, because he is the best driver and mercenary money can buy. In this installment, he meets Anna and they attempt to take down a group of ruthless Russian human traffickers who also have kidnapped Frank’s father.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Every year in the ruins of what was once North America, the nation of Panem forces each of its twelve districts to send a teenage boy and girl to compete in the Hunger Games. Part twisted entertainme.

programme.title: Set Up
programme.desc: A group of friends plan out a detailed heist that turns deadly when one betrays the other by taking off with the goods. Taking matters into his own hands, Sonny seeks out his revenge teaming up with the most dangerous mob boss in town to get back what is rightfully his. When he finally comes face to face with his longtime friend he will be forced to make a life changing choice.

programme.title: The Love Laugh Live Show
programme.desc: A prominent Indian anchor interviews famous celebrities and brings out their fun side by talking about their life and love stories. India 2019.

programme.title: CLASS OF 3000 S1
programme.desc: When Li'l D finds out that Sunny will have to spend his Saturday relaxing at a teacher's retreat instead of tackling his weekend To-Do List Li'l D proposes that he and the Westley kids do Sunny's chores in exchange for the use of Sunny's state-of-the-art home studio. programme.title: CLASS OF 3000 S1
programme.desc: When Philly Phil starts feeling like an outcast at Westley because of his poor performance in a Field Day event he transfers to a science magnet school. Missing their friend and feeling guilty for their role in making him feel unwanted the Westley kids have their work cut out for him when they try to woo him back. Meanwhile Luna is tired of being constantly upstaged by Sunny and vows to make the school think he's just as cool.
